header-and-summary.name: John Doe
header-and-summary.title: Full Stack Developer
header-and-summary.hero-section-paragraph-1: Experienced Full Stack Developer with 8+ years of expertise in building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean code, modern technologies, and creating exceptional user experiences. Currently seeking new opportunities to contribute my skills and grow professionally.
header-and-summary.hero-section-paragraph-2: Specialized in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Strong background in agile development, team collaboration, and delivering high-quality solutions on time.

work-experience.title: Senior Software Developer
work-experience.description: Led development of full-stack web applications. Managed team of 5 developers. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and improved system performance by 40%.

work-experience.title: Full Stack Developer
work-experience.description: Developed and maintained multiple client-facing applications. Collaborated with designers and product managers. Implemented responsive designs and optimized database queries.

work-experience.title: Junior Developer
work-experience.description: Built features for web and mobile applications. Participated in code reviews and learned best practices. Contributed to open-source projects.

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Built a full-featured e-commerce platform with payment integration, inventory management, and admin dashboard.

projects.name: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Created a real-time analytics dashboard with data visualization and custom reporting features.

projects.name: Mobile App API
projects.description: Developed RESTful API serving mobile application with authentication, caching, and rate limiting.
